recommendations.title: Race
recommendations.overview: The plot thickens around two horse-racing competitors when three beautiful women come into their lives and a murder is committed.
recommendations.director: Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla, Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Race 2
recommendations.overview: Ranvir Singh encounters the Indian mafia in Turkey as he carries out a mission to avenge his lover's death.
recommendations.director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Baadshah
recommendations.overview: A small time detective is mistaken as a CBI agent and gets embroiled in a deadly mission to save the Chief Minister from an assassination attempt.
recommendations.director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: The Fate of the Furious
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime and a betrayal of those closest to him, the crew face trials that will test them as never before.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: The Lady from Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A romantic drifter gets caught between a corrupt tycoon and his voluptuous wife.

recommendations.title: Suspicion
recommendations.overview: A sheltered heiress falls for a charming playboy and elopes with him, but soon discovers his gambling vice and mounting debts. As his lies deepen and those around them meet mysterious ends, she begins to suspect that her husband’s affection may conce

recommendations.title: Novocaine
recommendations.overview: A dentist finds himself a murder suspect after a sexy patient seduces him into prescribing her drugs.

recommendations.title: A Short Film About Killing
recommendations.overview: Jacek climbs into the taxi driven by Waldemar, tells him to drive to a remote location, then brutally strangles him, seemingly without motive.
